figures.caption: Table 2: Effective rank: number of singular components for the stated variance threshold (median across all heads). The spectral gap between M and Ẽ persists across all five models.

Table 1: Cumulative variance captured by the top r singular components (median across all heads). Ẽ concentrates its variance in a few components. WT QWK does not. Models are grouped by head dimension: dh = 64 (left) and dh = 128 (right).
